name: Oven Pot Roast with Beer
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a chuck roast or similar cut.
2. Place the roast in a large oven-proof pan with lid.
3. Mix the remaining ingredients except beer and pour evenly over the roast.
4. Roast uncovered at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour.
5. Pour room temperature beer over, cover, and cook for an additional 2-3 hours depending on the thickness of the roast. For a thicker sauce, thicken with flour if desired.
